name: Cumbersome
official_rules_text: When a unit adds a weapon with the Cumbersome keyword to an Attack Pool, it downgrades each of that weapon's attack dice if that unit has made any Moves during the same Activation.
description: When a unit adds a weapon with the Cumbersome keyword to an Attack Pool, it downgrades each of that weapon's attack dice if that unit has made any Moves during the same Activation.
